_comment: Kiro host config. Following the proven gstack model, DevLoop ships Kiro SKILLS ONLY (the same shared skills/ library, installed namespaced under .kiro/skills/devloop/ by the CLI) plus one lean auto-steering orchestrator that sequences the gated chain. No custom subagents / hooks / MCP example — those weren't reliably surfaced and added fragile install machinery. Skills are invoked by auto-trigger (description), `$<role>`, or the `/skills` picker. Authored (not generated): README.md.

steering.name: devloop
steering.description: DevLoop business-analysis chain — turning a feature idea into requirements, INVEST user stories, a story review, and a Jira organization plan, grounded in compiled LLM-Wikis. Use when the user asks to gather requirements, write stories/tickets, or plan a backlog.
